selected_dialects.reason: Bottom plate 400x300x20 with corner mounting holes is a prismatic machined plate — extrude_rectangle + cut_hole cover the plate and 16mm holes.
Four cylindrical columns diameter 50 height 200 are axisymmetric solids — revolve_profile or equivalent covers each column.
Four columns must be placed at corners and unioned with bottom plate and top plate — translate_solid/place_component + boolean_union across independent components.

safety_notes: Generative CAD output is reference geometry only — not manufacturing-ready, not structurally validated.
